reference_summary: Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. is a Delaware-domiciled private equity fund managed by its General Partner, Horizon Alpha GP, LLC. The fund charges a 2.0% annual management fee on Capital Commitments and a 20% carried interest, subject to an 8% preferred return (European waterfall). The fund has a 10-year term with a 5-year commitment period and is governed by Delaware law.
notes: Gold-standard summary — every listed checklist item must appear in the generated summary.

The amendment modifies specific sections of the original LPA; the General Partner remains Horizon Alpha GP, LLC. Most core economic terms (fee, carry, preferred return) are unchanged and not restated in this amendment.

inline_content: SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT — Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. The undersigned hereby subscribes for a Capital Commitment of USD 25,000,000. The Subscriber represents that it is an accredited investor within the meaning of Rule 501 of Regulation D under the Securities Act of 1933.
reference_summary: A Subscription Agreement for Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. in which the Subscriber commits USD 25,000,000. The Subscriber represents that it is an accredited investor under Rule 501 of Regulation D.
notes: Short doc — tests that summarizer does not pad with generic PE boilerplate.

inline_content:
# SIDE LETTER
Parties: Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P. and Canadian Sovereign Fund.

## Most Favored Nations
If the General Partner grants any other limited partner economic terms more favorable than those contained herein, those terms shall be offered to Canadian Sovereign Fund on a Most Favored Nations basis.

## Confidentiality Waiver
Subscriber is subject to public-records disclosure laws.
## Excuse Rights
Subscriber may elect to be excused from any Portfolio Investment that would violate its responsible-investment policy.
reference_summary: A side letter to Horizon Equity Partners IV granting Canadian Sovereign Fund three key accommodations: Most Favored Nations rights on economics, a confidentiality carve-out for public-records disclosure obligations, and excuse rights for investments that violate its responsible-investment policy.
notes: Summary should capture MFN, confidentiality waiver, and excuse rights.

# CAPITAL CALL NOTICE NO. 3
Fund: Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P.
Date issued: March 15, 2026. Due: March 30, 2026.
Amount called: 8% of each Limited Partner's Capital Commitment.
Purpose: new investment in Project Helios.
Wire instructions: [REDACTED]

notes: Summary should identify fund, call percent, due date, and purpose.

inline_content:
# SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT — STATE PENSION TRUST
Partnership: Horizon Equity Partners IV, L.P.
Subscriber: Oregon State Pension Trust.
Capital Commitment: USD 50,000,000.
Investor Class: Institutional.
Closing date: February 1, 2026.
Investor represents it is a Qualified Purchaser under the Investment Company Act.
Investor acknowledges receipt of the Partnership Agreement and Private Placement Memorandum.
reference_summary: A subscription agreement from Oregon State Pension Trust to Horizon Equity Partners IV for a $50,000,000 institutional capital commitment, with the investor representing it is a Qualified Purchaser and acknowledging receipt of the partnership agreement and PPM.

inline_content:
# LPA SNAPSHOT — ACORN MICRO FUND I, L.P.
A Delaware limited partnership with a $25M target size.
Management fee: 2%.
Carried interest: 20% with no preferred return.
Governing law: Delaware. 7-year term.
reference_summary: Acorn Micro Fund I, L.P. is a $25M Delaware venture fund with a 2% management fee, 20% carried interest (no preferred return), and a 7-year term governed by Delaware law.

inline_content:
# PARTIAL TERMS SHEET — ROCKFORD VENTURES FUND I
Rockford Ventures Fund I, L.P. — early-stage venture fund.
The Management Fee shall be 2.5% per annum during the Investment Period.
Other economic terms, including the Preferred Return, Carried Interest, and Fund Term, will be set forth in the definitive Partnership Agreement.
reference_summary: A partial terms sheet for Rockford Ventures Fund I, L.P. stating only the management fee (2.5% per annum during the Investment Period). Other economics — preferred return, carried interest, and fund term — are deferred to the definitive Partnership Agreement.
notes: The document explicitly defers several terms — the summary must not hallucinate numeric values for them.

inline_content:
# PRIVATE PLACEMENT MEMORANDUM — SUMMIT GROWTH FUND III
Summit Growth Fund III, L.P. is a growth-equity fund managed by Summit Growth GP, LLC.
Target size: $500M. Vintage: 2026. GP commit: 2%.
Economics: 1.75% management fee, 20% carry over an 8% preferred return.
Strategy: minority growth investments in North-American B2B software companies.
Term: 10 years with two 1-year extensions at GP discretion. Delaware law.
reference_summary: A PPM for Summit Growth Fund III, L.P., a $500M 2026-vintage growth-equity fund managed by Summit Growth GP, LLC. Terms: 1.75% management fee, 20% carry over an 8% preferred return, 2% GP commitment, 10-year term with two 1-year extensions, Delaware law. Strategy: minority growth investments in North-American B2B software.
